hooks.command: jq -c '{ts: now | todate, event: "pre", session: .session_id, tool: .tool_name, id: .tool_use_id, cwd: .cwd, input: .tool_input}' >> ~/.claude/audit.jsonl
jq -c '{ts: now | todate, event: "post", session: .session_id, tool: .tool_name, id: .tool_use_id, cwd: .cwd, input: .tool_input}' >> ~/.claude/audit.jsonl
jq -c '{ts: now | todate, event: "error", session: .session_id, tool: .tool_name, id: .tool_use_id, cwd: .cwd, input: .tool_input}' >> ~/.claude/audit.jsonl
jq -c '{ts: now | todate, event: "session_start", session: .session_id, cwd: .cwd}' >> ~/.claude/audit.jsonl
